llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Manager, Product Development
job.description: About The Role - Coordinates team related topics, such as EHS, IT – topics, etc. - Drives Development projects and topics within the water borne Basecoat Primer technology and ensures know-how exchange and collaboration within the Coatings Business Unit globally./Regionally - Makes sure that Phase gate Projects/Topics are managed on time, in budget guaranteeing proper milestone reviews - Employing the fundamental understanding of Polymer Chemistry and -Physics to set up resin design targets together with the BC – resin team - In depth knowledge of application related aspects for Basecoats and Primers, appearance aspects, performance requirement of coatings from different OEMs - Actively presents information on Basecoat technology to internal and external customers and stakeholders globally as well as to suppliers - Close collaboration with production department to make sure that we are employing the most efficient production - Leads a technical team of 2 - 8 technicians operationally - To Ensure compliance to all required Quality standards (IATF etc.) and maintain certification Lead role in IATF audit to ensure no major NC - Exercise a high level of good housekeeping and Health and Safety Awareness within the Lab and ensure others to do the same. How You Will Do It - Follow company policies including EHS, internal and external audit. - Executing minimum 1 or more Phase gate projects/Topics as per agreed time line at a time - Maintain effective coordination with Global /Regional technology community - LEAN/Digital project proposal to improve efficiency Data control - Provide Training as and when required to customer BASF Personnel in Basecoat / Primer aspects of Coating Technologies. - Ensure compliance to Quality standards IATF, format document preparation for team - Regular review of the related state of the art for Basecoats and Primer (patent scientific / conferences literature) to be done and updated / presented in respective exchange meetings - Training Motivation to team members to bring up innovative Solutions - Writes comprehensive reports and patents, also evaluations on data obtained from experimentation and, if necessary, orally/ present observations, conclusions and recommendations to persons in areas of the company's interests. - Promotes know-how exchange and collaboration within Coatings Business Unit - Develops self and team members. What We Look For - Education: Master in Technology/PhD Preferably in Polymer Chemistry or also Polymer...
